---
title: "Easter Sunday on the Snoqualmie Valley Trail"
description: "21.78 miles southbound from Duvall and back. No PR setting — just taking Bus 11 (my legs) on a scenic ride."
author: "synesis"
date: "2024-03-31"
categories: [running, long run, video, personal]
image: cover.jpg
---

![[Watch on YouTube](https://youtu.be/pUEpE2HJScc)](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

12oz water and 2 gel packs. No PR setting, just taking Bus 11 (my legs) on a scenic ride! 🐇

21.78 miles southbound along Snoqualmie Valley Trail, from Duvall and back. Clear sky with mild temperature (47F) and gentle breeze.


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_running-activity-7180449060653346817-CgIP).*
